rationale: Stacks adaptive-trigger-thresholds (promoted round 2, +6.1%) with early-termination-low-usefulness (near-miss, +3.4%). Combined: entity-type-aware triggers fire more precisely, AND when branches produce low-usefulness results, the cell terminates early instead of wasting a refinement round. Compound discount: estimating +7% net vs +9.5% additive.

Stacks adaptive-trigger-thresholds (promoted, +6.1%) with merge-confidence-weighted (near-miss, +3.5%). Combined: triggers fire more precisely per entity type, AND hypothesis selection during merge prefers evidence-backed branches over raw usefulness. Discount: +6.5% net vs +9.6% additive.

Triple stack: adaptive-trigger + early-termination + merge-confidence. Entity-aware triggers reduce false fires, early termination saves wall clock on dead ends, confidence-weighted merge improves output quality. Heavy discount: +8% net vs +13% additive.

Fresh proposal: add per-branch wall clock timeout (30s) so a single slow branch can't consume the entire 90s budget. Currently branches run without individual timeouts — if one branch's query takes 60s, the other branches get only 30s for refinement. Promise.race with per-branch abort improves worst-case latency.

Fresh proposal: counter_hypothesis branch treats all signals equally regardless of age. A 6-month-old revenue signal is less reliable than yesterday's funding announcement. Adding recency decay (weight = 1 / (1 + daysSinceObserved/90)) to signal contribution in hypothesis generation improves factual precision.

Fresh proposal: evidence_gap_fill queries the entity graph with limit=12 at depth 1 only. For entities with sparse direct relationships, adding a second hop (depth=2, limit=6) through connected entities can surface transitive relationships that explain gaps.

Fresh proposal: evidence_gap_fill reports all 'unavailable' dimensions equally. But burn rate is structurally unknowable for pre-seed startups, while funding is structurally available for any funded company. Filtering gaps by entity-type plausibility prevents the operator from chasing structurally unavailable data.

Fresh proposal: dedupeRelationships keeps the first occurrence of a from|to|type triple. When multiple branches find the same relationship with different confidence levels, we should keep the highest confidence version rather than the first-seen one.

Quad stack: adaptive-trigger + early-termination + merge-confidence + priority-aware-branch-planning. All four near-misses combined. Fires more precisely, terminates dead ends, selects evidence-backed hypotheses, and allocates branch slots to the highest-value strategies. Heavy discount: +9% net.

Fresh proposal: limitations are flat strings with no triage guidance. Adding severity (critical/warning/info) lets operators skip info-level limitations and focus on critical gaps, reducing time-to-first-action on the research cell output.

Fresh proposal: source diversification counts distinct kind values equally. A 'filing' source should count 3x a 'social' source for diversification quality. Weighted diversity score produces more actionable recommendations for which source types to pursue.

Stacks the promoted adaptive-trigger with early-termination AND signal-recency-weighting. Triggers precisely, terminates dead ends, and weights hypothesis generation by signal freshness. Compound discount: +8% net.

Fresh proposal: counter_hypothesis treats all causal chains as equal. A chain with 5 linked events is stronger evidence than a chain with 1. Adding depth-based quality scoring (depth * 0.15 bonus to usefulness) helps operators focus on the most substantiated narratives.

Fresh proposal: maxToolCallsPerBranch=15 is 7x the actual usage (max 2 calls per branch). Right-sizing to 6 creates conceptual clarity — budget documents reality. Also signals to future optimizers where the actual capacity ceiling is.

Full compound: adaptive-trigger + early-termination + merge-confidence + branch-planning + signal-recency + dedup-max-confidence. All strong near-misses in one candidate. Maximum possible throughput lift with heavy compounding discount: +10% net.
